iki81pg672h2nkrin3fl0j5nfs.summary: You face critical organizational and talent pressures—most notably Rebecca’s June 28 departure and a total lack of succession plans for key personnel like Wilkins—which are compounded by severe staffing gaps in P&C data architecture and heavy vendor reliance. You must also navigate massive restructuring changes following Saad Ahmed's departure and address the June 28 deadline for the critical security vulnerability initiative. No direct notes exist for the pulse survey—implying you must seek updates on employee sentiment during this period of high turnover and reorganizational friction.
tasks: Address the critical staffing gaps immediately—specifically backfilling Rebecca's vacated role before June 28 and securing a dedicated P&C data architect to resolve high-profile data errors.
Finalize the formal succession plans requested by Deepok for Wilkins, Burris, Proft, and Karis to mitigate key-person dependency risks.
Establish the engineering "tiger team" and war room to meet the June 28 deadline for 100% compliance on high-end critical security vulnerability remediation.
Clarify the ownership and allocation of the separate $880k process optimization and $1.2M GenAI funding buckets to resolve the Pega backlog bottleneck.
Request direct updates on the pulse survey results during the meeting to gauge staff sentiment amid these intensive organizational restructures.
iki81pg672h2nkrin3fl0j5nfs.title: Combined Full Staff & Monthly Leadership meeting
